title: Patch Prescriber score to recognize 'prescribed by' evidence
description: Implement the approved Prescriber clarification that the phrase 'prescribed by' plus provider name counts as valid medication-linked prescriber verification evidence for SRX when tied to the medication being reviewed. Update both the score guidelines and the current score version with a minimal wording patch; do not broaden other Prescriber rules or change optimizer direction.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Created new Medication Review: Prescriber score version 36a49c0f-e9a3-49fe-b1aa-1d82dffb7d7b from current champion line after approved clarification on item 307498132. Change scope was intentionally narrow: explicitly recognize an SRX medication review statement of prescribed by plus provider name as valid medication-linked prescriber verification evidence when tied to the medication and confirmed or clearly accepted by the patient. No invalidations performed and no optimizer restart performed in this step.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Finalized the Prescriber clarification as score version 770575d5-b3dd-4939-a19d-64ac99fb592e (follow-up from intermediate version 36a49c0f-e9a3-49fe-b1aa-1d82dffb7d7b). Verified that both the YAML prompt and the markdown guidelines now explicitly recognize prescribed by plus provider-name phrasing as valid medication-linked prescriber verification evidence when tied to the medication and confirmed or clearly accepted by the patient. No invalidations performed and no optimizer restart performed in this step.
